raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Azucena Castro and Jennifer Barrientos won the Mathematics Engineering Science Achievement’s National Engineering Design Competition for their prosthetic arm design.",
    "MESA helps thousands of educationally disadvantaged students by providing learning opportunities in the science, technology, engineering, and math (STEM) fields.",
    "MESA engineers from 10 states competed to design the most efficient and affordable prosthetic arm.",
    "The winning entry by Castro and Barrientos was made of mailing tube, duct tape, rubber bands, a synthetic belt, claw, and eraser, valued at $25.",
    "The success of Castro and Barrientos encourages other young women to pursue careers in STEM fields."
  ]
}
```
